Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt.JwtTokenValidator.Builder

Packages that use JwtTokenValidator.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt
JWT bearer-token validation backed by com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt.

  • Uses of JwtTokenValidator.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.jwt that return JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.algorithms(com.nimbusds.jose.JWSAlgorithm... values)
    Sets the signing-algorithm allowlist.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.audience(String value)
    Sets the required aud (audience) claim value.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.clock(Clock value)
    Overrides the Clock used for exp / nbf comparisons and JWKS cache TTL.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.clockSkew(Duration value)
    Sets the clock-skew tolerance for exp / nbf validation.
    static JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.create()
    Static creator.
    static JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.create(BeanStore beanStore)
    Static creator with explicit bean store.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.issuer(String value)
    Sets the required iss (issuer) claim value.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.jwksCacheTtl(Duration value)
    Sets the JWKS cache TTL.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.jwksEagerRefreshCooldown(Duration value)
    Sets the minimum spacing between consecutive eager JWKS refreshes.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.jwksEagerRefreshOnKidMiss(boolean value)
    Enables or disables the eager JWKS refresh that fires on a fresh-cache kid miss.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.jwkSource(com.nimbusds.jose.jwk.source.JWKSource<com.nimbusds.jose.proc.SecurityContext> value)
    Sets a custom JWKSource the validator fetches keys from.
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder
    JwtTokenValidator.Builder.jwksUrl(URI value)
    Sets the JWKS endpoint URL the validator fetches keys from.
